<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List tags"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/tags"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists company tags for a single taggable entity type.

`entity_type` is required so task tags and project tags never bleed into the same picker.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
